summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GRS Global ERP client and stone features. Verified login functionality, client create/edit dialogs with secondary fields and 2-column layout, and stone verbal findings features including Certificate ID requirements and form locking.
passed_tests: Client create dialog: Secondary Email and Secondary Phone fields present
Client create dialog: 2-column layout with 4 grid containers
Client edit dialog: Secondary Email and Secondary Phone fields present
Client edit dialog: 2-column layout with 4 grid containers
Stone DI150J301 verbal findings: Certificate ID field with red asterisk (*)
Stone dialog shows 'Completed' badge when verbal findings are saved
Stone dialog shows 'Edit' button next to Completed badge
Form fields are properly organized in compact layout
Navigation between Dashboard, Clients, and Jobs pages
